title: NotRatedByEnum
description: The enumerated values applicable to define the what conditions apply to trigger a Not Rated condition.

oneOf.title: All
oneOf.description: No rating is available for the Party for any of the stated Rating Agencies.

oneOf.title: One
oneOf.description: No rating is available for the Party for any one of the stated Rating Agencies.

oneOf.title: Two
oneOf.description: No rating is available for the Party for any two of the stated Rating Agencies.
